reviews.comment:
Pasamos para que nos revisen el auto ya que en la ruta se nos había prendido la luz del motor y la llave inglesa. Nos recomendó llegar a las 9 del día siguiente ya que estaban completos y sin espacio. Por suerte al día siguiente temprano nos pudieron revisar el auto ya que era una urgencia. En una hora y media nos dieron el diagnóstico. Nos consiguieron repuesto por la pieza que fallaba y para las 17 ya lo tenían listo. Nos cobraron 64000 por la revisión ya que el socio y dueño del auto no estaba presente, sino hubiera sido 32000. Más el repuesto y mano de obra 260000. No nos podemos quejar porque era una urgencia e hicieron lo posible para poder arreglar el problema. Por ahora el auto anda bien. Tenía garantía de 3 meses. No tenían cuotas.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped by to have our car checked because the engine light and wrench icon had come on while we were driving. They recommended we come back at 9:00 the next day since they were fully booked and had no space. Luckily, they were able to check the car early the next morning because it was an emergency. They gave us the diagnosis in an hour and a half. They got us a replacement part for the faulty component, and it was ready by 5:00 PM. They charged us 64,000 for the inspection because the owner and partner of the car wasn't present; otherwise, it would have been 32,000. Adding the part and labor, the total came to 260,000. We can't complain because it was an emergency, and they did everything they could to fix the problem. For now, the car is running well. It had a 3-month warranty. They didn't offer payment plans.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnLTQyempRRRAB
